purpose.text: This process feeds a batch of dispute transactions into the 'Q-Disputes' work queue so that they can be worked downstream (e.g., by a case-handling or investigation process). It iterates over a collection of disputes, stages each dispute's key fields, and loads each one into the queue, tracking how many items were successfully loaded.

inputs.name: Disputes
inputs.description: Collection of dispute records to be loaded, each with a dispute reference, account number, dispute amount, and transaction date.
inputs.source: Pre-populated data item (collection) within the process, presumably sourced upstream from a case management or transaction system

outputs.name: Q-Disputes queue items
outputs.description: Each dispute record is added as an item to the Q-Disputes work queue for downstream processing.

outputs.name: ItemCount
outputs.description: Total count of dispute items successfully loaded into the queue during this run, returned as a process output.

business_rules.statement: Every dispute in the input collection must be added to the Q-Disputes work queue for downstream handling.
Each queue item must carry the dispute reference, account number, dispute amount, and transaction date.
The process must report the number of dispute items loaded into the queue as an output.
